markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, blockers, and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Looker Access Blocked:** Access is stalled by Udemy's policy against signing Data Processing Agreements (DPAs). Justin is working with procurement to find a workaround.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**AI Category Definitions Set:** To resolve content overlap, "Upskilling" is defined as training on specific AI tools, while "Literacy" covers foundational knowledge like ethics.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Enhancements:** Tables will be added to content starting the week of Dec 15, with in-text images to follow after a required pipeline customization.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Image Creation Paused:** GrowthX will not create header images for now, as Udemy's production team is handling the work. GrowthX will create mockups for a potential Q1/Q2 reevaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

## Topics

### Blockers & Resolutions

  - [**Looker Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Access is stalled because Udemy's policy prohibits signing the required Data Processing Agreement (DPA).](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Justin is working with procurement to find a workaround, citing the Statement of Work (SoW) that grants GrowthX access to "CMS and analytics tools."](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Image Creation:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [**Decision:** Udemy's production team will continue creating header images through EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The decision was made to avoid stepping on the production team's toes.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will create mockups in the background for a potential reevaluation in Q1/Q2.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Localization Link Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Problem:** Google search results for Udemy Business articles sometimes redirect to localized pages (e.g., German) instead of the English version.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Jay confirmed a known fix: translate the page twice in Chrome.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [**Pipeline Fix:** GrowthX is adding a check to its pipeline to ensure only the main `udemy.com/business` link is used, stripping out localization tags.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Content Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**AI Category Definitions:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [To resolve overlap, the team defined the scope for two key AI categories:](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
          - [**AI Upskilling:** Training on specific tools and use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
          - [**AI Literacy:** Foundational knowledge, concepts, and ethics.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This distinction will guide content creation and keyword targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Pipeline Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Tables:** Implementation begins the week of Dec 15.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**In-Text Images:** Requires pipeline customization; mockups are expected in the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**B2B Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure content is distinct from the consumer blog.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [**Method:** Use a B2B lens and target lower-volume B2B keywords to avoid direct competition.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Process & Goals

  - [**Content Review Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Request:** Justin will ask the review team (Jen) to provide consolidated feedback on recurring patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows GrowthX to refine its AI pipeline and reduce revision cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**CMS Access for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Goal:** Grant GrowthX CMS access for direct posting of supporting articles.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Q1/Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Communication:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
      - [**Request:** Use the main external Slack channel for all strategic discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures context is shared with the full team, preventing knowledge silos.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Resolve the Looker DPA blocker with procurement.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Provide \~100-word blurbs defining AI Upskilling vs. Literacy.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Request consolidated feedback patterns from the content review team.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Create AI header image mockups for a potential Q1/Q2 reevaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Implement tables in content starting the week of Dec 15.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [Develop mockups for in-text images.](https://fathom.video/share/DQsP1psMA4dUVCEgDq28Bf-JJHfBdxF_?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
